TEST-SHU_ORB.description: 充能球：回合开始时抽牌。
TEST-SHU_ORB.smartDescription:
[gold]被动：[/gold]回合开始时，抽[blue]{Passive}[/blue]张牌。
[gold]激发：[/gold]抽[blue]{Evoke}[/blue]张牌。
TEST-SHU_ORB.title: 鼠
TEST-GRASS_ORB.description: 充能球：回合结束时回血
TEST-GRASS_ORB.smartDescription:
[gold]被动：[/gold]回合结束时，回复[green]{Passive}[/green]点生命。
[gold]激发：[/gold]回复[green]{Passive}[/green]点生命
TEST-GRASS_ORB.title: 草元素
